subcodes.first_line: O My leaf! Say thou: O God of might and Sovereign of the Kingdom, I beseech Thee by Him through Whom awe hath seized all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک ان تقولی یا ورقتی یا اله الجبروت و سلطان الملکوت اسئلک بالذی به اخذ الفزع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
